patient_profile_summary.present_illness_positive: several days of worsening cough (mild); 1 day of chills; 1 day of rigors; 1 day of shortness of breath; appears more tachypneic according to wife; chronic productive cough with clear sputum at baseline; sputum remains clear without purulence or blood; granddaughter sick with fevers and cough
patient_profile_summary.present_illness_negative: denies fevers; denies myalgias; denies arthralgias; denies rhinorrhea; denies sore throat; denies rash; denies conjunctivitis; denies nausea; denies vomiting; denies abdominal pain; denies chest pain; denies lower extremity edema; denies orthopnea
patient_profile_summary.medical_history: End-stage COPD (on 3 inhalers; dyspneic with minimal exertion; FEV1 28; FEV1/FVC 74; uses 5L O2 at home; breathes via pursed-lips at baseline); right pleural effusion of unknown etiology s/p thoracoscopic decortication with likely fibrothorax; RBBB; community-acquired pneumonia requiring prior ICU admission

turns.doctor: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
Can you tell me about your past medical history?
turns.patient: I have COPD. I had a problem with my lung before, a pleural effusion. And I have RBBB.

turns.doctor: Do you live alone or with someone?
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
turns.patient: I smoke. I don't drink alcohol. This breathing is not good.

turns.doctor: What medications do you usually take?
turns.patient: I use Spiriva and Advair. Is my breathing okay?
A few days ago I got a cough. The shortness of breath started yesterday. I'm worried about my breathing.
